recommendations.title: Publish Enhanced BRSR FY26 Report by 2026-05-30
recommendations.description: Prepare and commission third-party assurance for BRSR FY26 filing by 2026-05-30 to maintain NSE ESG rating and avoid SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹49.6 Cr capital cost reversal and potential SEBI penalties

recommendations.title: Commission Third-Party BRSR Assurance for FY26 Filing
recommendations.description: Engage an independent auditor to provide third-party assurance on BRSR FY26 disclosures by 2026-05-30 to strengthen credibility and maintain NSE ESG rating.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹49.6 Cr capital cost penalty and SEBI scrutiny

recommendations.title: Issue ₹500 Cr Green Bond by 2026-09-30
recommendations.description: Leverage the high NSE ESG rating to issue a ₹500 Cr green bond, targeting a 20-40 bps lower cost of capital, unlocking ₹49.6 Cr capital cost benefit. Coordinate issuance with CFO and Treasury teams.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹49.6 Cr capital cost benefit from 20-40 bps interest savings on ₹500 Cr issuance
recommendations.peer_benchmark: SBI attracted ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows via enhanced ESG disclosures

recommendations.title: Develop TCFD-aligned Scope 3 Emissions Report by 2026-12-31
recommendations.description: Commission a TCFD-aligned Scope 3 emissions report to match peer SBI’s CDP B rating, enhancing ESG transparency and attracting ESG-mandated FII inflows.
recommendations.profitability_link: Potential to attract ₹500-1000 Cr ESG fund inflows with 5-10% valuation premium
recommendations.peer_benchmark: SBI published TCFD report, attracted ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows

recommendations.title: Monitor Supplier Credit Stress Quarterly; Escalate if CCC+
recommendations.description: Implement quarterly monitoring of supplier credit ratings and current ratios; escalate to Risk Committee if any supplier rating falls to CCC+ or current ratio < 1.0 to mitigate supply chain risks impacting ESG rating.
recommendations.profitability_link: Prevent supply disruptions that could cause ESG rating downgrade and ₹49.6 Cr cost increase
